peer_group: 电子设备-红外热成像与特种光电感知
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Residual electronic-equipment companies should be split into real peer groups. Infrared sensing companies qualify only when detector; chip; algorithm; productization; customer validation; and economics prove that capital alone cannot quickly copy the platform.
margin_and_moat_assessment: 2025 revenue 6.304bn RMB; parent net profit 1.125bn RMB; gross margin 52.51%; net margin 15.72%; ROE 18.68%; R&D ratio 18.30%; cash-flow-to-revenue 29.43%. Core evidence is detector chip and thermal imaging platform depth plus high-margin scale.
analyst_response: Retained. 睿创微纳 is the infrared detector and multi-dimensional sensing anchor. It is not merely a hardware manufacturer because chip; module; algorithm; terminal; and scenario expansion reinforce each other.
calibrated_standard_implication: In infrared thermal imaging retain platform companies when chip-level capability; high-margin productization; R&D intensity; and broad customer use prove a hard-to-replicate technology moat.

peer_group: 电子设备-红外热成像与特种光电感知
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Retain differentiated peers when the company is not a weaker copy of the anchor and has a separate system-level or equipment-level moat.
margin_and_moat_assessment: 2025 revenue 4.619bn RMB; parent net profit 686mn RMB; gross margin 56.33%; net margin 14.86%; ROE 10.27%; R&D ratio 20.15%; cash-flow-to-revenue 34.83%. Evidence supports full-chain infrared core devices; high-end optoelectronic systems; and advanced equipment systems.
analyst_response: Retained. 高德红外 is kept beside 睿创微纳 because its whole-chain complete-equipment and high-end system-integration position is differentiated from a detector-led platform thesis.
calibrated_standard_implication: Keep multiple infrared leaders only when one company is detector/platform-led and another has source-backed complete-system or equipment integration advantages.

peer_group: 电子设备-红外热成像与特种光电感知
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Boundary companies with real technology are still rejected when listed-company evidence does not prove irreplaceable position versus retained leaders.
margin_and_moat_assessment: 2025 revenue 684mn RMB; parent net profit 24mn RMB; gross margin 33.05%; net margin 3.53%; ROE 1.87%; R&D ratio 9.57%; cash-flow-to-revenue 29.28%. CSSC background; infrared; laser; and optical processing are real but current scale and economics are much weaker than retained peers.
analyst_response: Rejected for now. 久之洋 is not rejected because the technology is fake. It is rejected because available evidence does not yet prove a company-level moat strong enough to stand beside 睿创微纳 and 高德红外.
calibrated_standard_implication: Defense or research-institute background is not enough. Retain only if the listed company proves differentiated high-value contracts; market position; or economics not covered by stronger infrared leaders.

peer_group: 电子设备-红外热成像与特种光电感知
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Losses alone should not reject a technology company. The rejection reason must be whether source-backed capability can resist stronger competitors and become durable economics.
margin_and_moat_assessment: 2025 revenue 347mn RMB; parent net profit -224mn RMB; gross margin 25.85%; net margin -66.42%; ROE -15.71%; R&D ratio 43.10%; cash-flow-to-revenue 6.68%. Dual-route detector mass production is real but scale; customers; and sustained economics remain unproven.
analyst_response: Rejected for now. *ST大立 has meaningful technical accumulation but current evidence does not show that it can defend market position or economics against stronger infrared platforms.
calibrated_standard_implication: A high R&D ratio and real technology are insufficient when customer validation and business quality do not yet prove durable moat conversion. Re-entry requires order recovery and stronger detector/system economics.

peer_group: 电子设备-红外热成像与特种光电感知
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Weak-copy rejection applies when a company participates in a high-barrier industry but lacks enough scale; customer durability; and economics versus retained leaders.
margin_and_moat_assessment: 2025 revenue 210mn RMB; parent net profit -82mn RMB; gross margin 37.80%; net margin -39.22%; ROE -17.85%; R&D ratio 29.57%; cash-flow-to-revenue -39.02%. Industry technology barrier exists but company-level proof is weak.
analyst_response: Rejected for now. 富吉瑞 is not kept because current evidence points to a smaller and weaker infrared platform whose role is substantially covered by retained leaders.
calibrated_standard_implication: Do not retain every company in a high-barrier industry. Company-level moat must survive dominance comparison against stronger retained peers.
